description: An agent is hosting an open house and must manage marketing, setup, and visitor follow-up.

nodes.task_description: Market the open house on the MLS, Zillow, and social media platforms.

expected_outcome.value: Marketing posts are created and scheduled for the week leading up to the event.

nodes.task_description: During the open house, greet visitors and use a digital sign-in sheet to capture their contact information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects contact information from at least 10 potential buyers.

nodes.task_description: Send a follow-up email to all attendees thanking them for coming and asking for feedback.

expected_outcome.value: A follow-up campaign is executed the next day.
